description: PolicyNote is FiscalNote's policy intelligence product for legislative and regulatory data. It provides access to policy, stakeholder, organization, election, and related government-affairs datasets across U.S. and international jurisdictions.
summary: PolicyNote exposes a REST HTTP API at `https://data.policynote.com/` and an MCP server at `https://data.policynote.com/v0/mcp`; the API uses an issued API key exchanged for bearer tokens, and the MCP server uses OAuth.
